memberdef.name: IFX_CAT1_CLOCK_BLOCK_PERI_GROUP
memberdef.initializer: IFX_CAT1_CLOCK_BLOCK_PERIPHERAL##gr##_8BIT = IFX_CAT1_PERIPHERAL_GROUP_ADJUST( \ (gr), CY_SYSCLK_DIV_8_BIT), /*!< 8bit Peripheral Divider Group */ \ IFX_CAT1_CLOCK_BLOCK_PERIPHERAL##gr##_16BIT = IFX_CAT1_PERIPHERAL_GROUP_ADJUST( \ (gr), CY_SYSCLK_DIV_16_BIT), /*!< 16bit Peripheral Divider Group */ \ IFX_CAT1_CLOCK_BLOCK_PERIPHERAL##gr##_16_5BIT = IFX_CAT1_PERIPHERAL_GROUP_ADJUST( \ (gr), CY_SYSCLK_DIV_16_5_BIT), /*!< 16.5bit Peripheral Divider Group */ \ IFX_CAT1_CLOCK_BLOCK_PERIPHERAL##gr##_24_5BIT = IFX_CAT1_PERIPHERAL_GROUP_ADJUST( \ (gr), CY_SYSCLK_DIV_24_5_BIT)

memberdef.argsstring: (en_clk_dst_t clk_dest, const struct ifx_cat1_clock *_clock, uint32_t div)
memberdef.name: ifx_cat1_utils_peri_pclk_set_divider

memberdef.argsstring: (en_clk_dst_t clk_dest, const struct ifx_cat1_clock *_clock, uint32_t div_int, uint32_t div_frac)
memberdef.name: ifx_cat1_utils_peri_pclk_set_frac_divider

briefdescription.para: Map a peripheral group index to the HF clock that sources it.

detaileddescription.para: Fallback for SoC families that do not yet implement this mapping. Always returns -EINVAL.
